returns._0: Reward amount in BUGZ base units.

params.initialOwner: Owner that can manage index, brokers, and payout divisor.

params.amount: BUGZ amount to transfer from the caller.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

payRewardFromIndex(address,address,uint8.details: Reward amount is calculated from the treasury balance at call time before the transfer.

params.broker: Broker completing the payout; must be authorized in this treasury.

params.amount: BUGZ amount to transfer from the buyer.
params.reportHash: Report hash whose details key is being purchased.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.allowed: True to authorize reward payouts for this broker.

params.divisor: New nonzero divisor. Base payout is `balance / divisor`.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

BUGZ_TOKEN_ADDRESS().notice: Live BUGZ ERC20 address on Base.

DEFAULT_STANDARD_PAYOUT_DIVISOR().notice: Default divisor for the standard payout: treasury balance divided by 1,000.

MAX_REWARD_MULTIPLIER().notice: Maximum broker-selected reward multiplier for high-interest bugs.

brokerAt(uint256).notice: Returns a broker address by index.

brokerCount().notice: Returns the number of treasury-authorized brokers.

brokers(address).notice: Whether an address is authorized as a broker for treasury payouts.

bugz().notice: Returns the live BUGZ ERC20 interface.

calculateRewardAmount(uint8).notice: Calculates reward amount for a multiplier using the current treasury balance and divisor.

detailKeyPayments(bytes32,address).notice: Total BUGZ paid by buyer for a given report hash.

detailKeyPurchaseAt(uint256).notice: Returns a detail-key purchase record by index.

detailKeyPurchaseCount().notice: Returns the number of detail-key purchase records.

index().notice: Bug index contract authorized to request reward payouts.

payRewardFromIndex(address,address,uint8.notice: Pays a reporter reward when called by the configured index.

purchaseDetailKey(bytes32,uint256).notice: Pays BUGZ for a report's detail key and records the buyer's total payment.

setBroker(address,bool).notice: Grants or removes treasury broker authority.

setIndex(address).notice: Sets the bug index authorized to request payouts.

setStandardPayoutDivisor(uint256).notice: Sets the divisor used for base reporter rewards.

standardPayoutDivisor().notice: Divisor used to calculate the base payout from the current treasury balance.
